testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.text: Swati Enterprises has become my go-to pharmacy. The delivery is always on time, prices are genuinely lower than local pharmacies, and the product quality is excellent. Highly recommended!

testimonials.name: Rajesh Kumar
testimonials.text: Outstanding service! I ordered blood pressure medicines at midnight and they were delivered by morning. The packaging was sealed and authentic. Will definitely order again.

testimonials.name: Anita Patel
testimonials.text: Great collection of vitamins and supplements. The website is very easy to navigate and checkout is smooth. Customer support was very helpful when I had a query.

testimonials.name: Dr. Sunil Mehta
testimonials.text: As a doctor, I appreciate the authenticity of medicines here. I regularly recommend Swati Enterprises to my patients. Their diabetic care section is particularly well-stocked.

testimonials.name: Kavita Singh
testimonials.text: The baby care products are genuine and affordable. I've been buying Johnson's and Himalaya products from here for 2 years now. Never had an issue. Love the fast delivery!

testimonials.name: Mohan Gupta
testimonials.text: Fantastic range of orthopedic products. Got Volini spray and Moov cream at great discounts. The website is clean and the dark mode is a nice touch!

faqs.a: Yes, absolutely. We source all our medicines directly from authorized distributors and manufacturers. Every product is 100% authentic and comes with proper batch numbers and expiry dates.
We offer free delivery on orders above ₹499. Standard delivery takes 2-4 business days. Express delivery (same day in select cities) is also available. Order before 12 PM for same-day dispatch.

faqs.q: Do I need a prescription for medicines?
faqs.a: Prescription medicines require a valid prescription upload at checkout. OTC (over-the-counter) medicines can be purchased without prescription. Our pharmacist team verifies all prescriptions.

faqs.q: What is your return and refund policy?
faqs.a: We offer a 7-day return policy for unused products in original packaging. Medicines are non-returnable for safety reasons unless damaged or incorrect. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days.
Yes, 100%. We use industry-standard SSL encryption and PCI-DSS compliant payment gateways. We never store your card details on our servers. All transactions are fully secured.

faqs.q: Do you offer subscriptions for regular medicines?
faqs.a: Yes! Our AutoRefill feature lets you schedule regular medicine deliveries. You get an additional 5% discount on subscription orders. Perfect for chronic condition management.
